code: export function generateUserCode(){var name=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:'';var email=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:'';var s=""+email.trim().toLowerCase();var hash=0;for(var i=0;i<s.length;i++){var chr=s.charCodeAt(i);hash=(hash<<5)-hash+chr;hash|=0;}var absHash=Math.abs(hash);var code=absHash.toString(36).toUpperCase();if(code.length<5)code=code.padStart(5,'0');code=code.slice(0,6);return"U-"+code;}export default generateUserCode;
